title: Urgent Opening Category Manager at FabAlley

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Category Manager at FabAlley
jsonLd.description:
FabAlley invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Category Manager at our Srinagar location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About FabAlley:
FabAlley is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Develop and implement category growth strategies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FabAlley!
